keys.akukhoBhackup: Akukho bhackup ikhuselweyo ekhoyo yale akhawunti

keySetup.title: Lungiselela izitshixo zesixhobo sakho
keySetup.description: Esi sixhobo asikabinayo isitshixo sakho sasese. Ngenisa ibackup ekhuselwe ngephasiwedi, okanye wenze izitshixo ezitsha ezimbini (uza kukwazi ukufunda imiyalezo emitsha ukusukela ngoku).
keySetup.imported: Isitshixo esiyimfihlo singenisiwe kwesi sixhobo. Ungafunda imiyalezo endala ngoku.
keySetup.enterPassword: Faka ipassword yeakhawunti yakho ukuze sikwazi ukugcina isitshixo sakho ngokukhuselekileyo.

encryptionRecovery.title: Lawula i-Encryption
encryptionRecovery.description: Yenza ibackup, busisa, vula, okanye u-reset isitshixo sakho se-encryption.
encryptionRecovery.keyRequiredBody: Le browser ayikwazi okwangoku ukufunda imiyalezo yakho efihliweyo. Buyisela, vula, okanye uqalise ngokutsha isitshixo sakho ukuze uqhubeke.
encryptionRecovery.lockedBody: Buyisela okanye yivule isitshixo sakho sokufihla ukuze ufunde imiyalezo efihliweyo kwesi sixhobo.

iikhowudi zokuvula.inkcazelo: Zisetyenziselwa ukuvula izitshixo zakho apha kwisixhobo phambi kokuba uzithumele ngaphandle

restoreBackupPassword.label: Iphasiwedi yokugcina ikopi

resetLocalPasscode.label: I-passcode entsha yasekuhlaleni

devicePasscode.label: I-passcode yesixhobo
devicePasscode.description: Faka i-passcode esetyenziselwa ukukhusela izitshixo kwesi sixhobo.

newDevicePasscode.label: Iphasi-khowudi yesixhobo entsha
newDevicePasscode.inkcazelo: Yenza iphasi-khowudi ukukhusela ii-keys kwesi sixhobo.

resetDevicePasscode.label: Iphasi-khowudi yesixhobo entsha

errors.restoreIncomplete: Ukubuyisela isitshixo akugqitywanga okanye akuchanekanga kule akhawunti
errors.noServerPublicKey: Le akhawunti okwangoku ayivezi i-server public key
errors.serverBackupMismatch: I-server backup ayihambelani ne-encryption key ye-akhawunti yangoku
errors.resetFailed: Akukwazanga ukuseta ngokutsha i-encryption. Nceda uzame kwakhona.
errors.restoreFailed: Akukwazanga ukubuyisela isitshixo sakho sokufihla. Jonga ibackup yakho kunye nephasiwedi.
errors.unlockFailed: Akukwazanga ukukhulula isitshixo sakho sokufihla. Jonga ikhowudi yakho yokukhulula kwaye uzame kwakhona.

confirm.reset: Seta ngokutsha ukufihla kweli akhawunti?\n\nImiyalezo endala efihliweyo isenokungafundeki ngaphandle kokuba ubuyisele isitshixo sokuqala kamva.

encryptionRecovery.resetDescription: Oku kudala isitshixo esitsha sokufihla iimfihlo ze-akhawunti yakho. Imiyalezo endala efihliweyo inokungafundeki ngaphandle kokuba ubuyise isitshixo sokuqala kamva.

danger.title: Qala ukufihla iimfihlo okutsha
danger.body: Oku kudala isitshixo esitsha sokufihla iimfihlo. Imiyalezo endala efihliweyo inokungafundeki ngaphandle kokuba ubuyise isitshixo sokuqala kamva.

encryptionRecovery.simpleDescription: Sebenzisa iphaswedi yesixhobo sakho okanye ubuyisele i-backup ukuze uvule imiyalezo efihliweyo.
encryptionRecovery.restoreDescription: Buyisela isitshixo sakho sengxoxo efihliweyo kwi-backup ekhuselwe yiphaswedi yakho ye-backup.

smsConsent.label: Ndivuma ukufumana izaziso ze-SMS nezilumkiso ezivela kwi-{{companyName}}. Ukuphindaphinda kwemiyalezo kunokwahluka. Iirhafu zemiyalezo nedatha zinokusebenza. Phendula <stop>STOP</stop> ukurhoxisa nangaliphi na ixesha. Phendula <help>HELP</help> ukuze ufumane uncedo.

auth.headline: Imiyalezo ekhuselekileyo kuye nabani na, naphi na
auth.description: Ukuqiniswa kwemfihlo ukusuka ekuqaleni ukuya ekugqibeleni, ukuguqulelwa kwiilwimi ezingaphezu kwe-100, imiyalezo ephunyayo, kunye nokufowuna ngelizwi/ividiyo.

feature.encryption: Ukuqiniswa kwemfihlo ukusuka ekuqaleni ukuya ekugqibeleni ngokungagqibekanga
feature.ubumfihlo: Ubumfihlo kuqala. Idatha yakho, ulawulo lwakho.

hero.line1: Imiyalezo ekhuselekileyo kuye nabani na, naphi na — nge
hero.sub: Fumana inombolo yefowuni yasimahla ekhuselekileyo yokufowuna nokuthumela imiyalezo kwihlabathi jikelele nge-Wi-Fi okanye ngedatha. Yonwabela ukhuseleko lwemiyalezo ukusuka ekuqaleni ukuya ekugqibeleni, imiyalezo ephunyayo, kunye neefowuni zelizwi/ zevidiyo ze-HD — kunye nezixhobo ezakhelweyo ezikunceda uhlale unxibelelene nangaphaya kwemida.
hero.freeNote: Ukufowuna nokuthumela imiyalezo okuyisisiseko kusimahla. I-AI ephucukileyo kunye neempawu ezikumgangatho ophezulu zifuna ukuba uphuculele.

feat.encryption: Ukhuseleko lwemiyalezo ukusuka ekuqaleni ukuya ekugqibeleni, lusoloko lulapha
feat.privacy: Ubumfihlo kuqala. Idatha yakho, ulawulo lwakho.

forgotPassword.title: Ulibele i-password
forgotPassword.helper: Faka i-imeyile oyisebenzisileyo ukwenza i-akhawunti yakho ye-Chatforia kwaye siza kukuthumelela ikhonkco elikhuselekileyo lokuseta kwakhona i-password yakho.

forgotPassword.sentHelper: Ukuba ikhaka likhona ngale imeyile, sithumele ikhonkco lokuseta kwakhona iphasiwedi. Isenokuthatha imizuzu embalwa ukufika. Qiniseka ukuba ujonga ifolda yakho ye-spam okanye ye-promotions.

resetPassword.strongPasswordHint: Khetha iphasiwedi eyomeleleyo ongayisebenzisi kwenye indawo.

profile.title: Iprofayile yomsebenzisi
profile.noPrivateKey: Akukho sikhiye sasese kwesi sixhobo sokuthumela ngaphandle.
profile.importFailed: Kusiwe ekungeniseni isitshixo (iphasiwedi engeyiyo okanye ifayile yonakeleyo).
profile.keysRotated: Iqela elitsha lezitshixo liye laveliswa kwaye isitshixo esisebenzayo silayishiwe.
profile.keyDisclaimer: Isitshixo sakho esiyimfihlo asikhe siphume kwesi sixhobo. Thumela ngaphandle ikopi ekhuselwe ngephasiwedi ukuze ubuyisele ukuyifaka kwesinye isixhobo.
profile.themeFreeNotice: Usebenzisa i-Free—sebenzisa iinketho ezikhawulezayo zeLanga/zeNyanga apha ngezantsi. Phucula ukuze uvule iitimu ezingakumbi.
profile.backupDesc: Gcina ikhiyi yakho yokufihla ukuze ukwazi ukubuyisela imiyalezo yakho ngokukhuselekileyo kwesinye isixhobo.
profile.freePlanCopy: Usekwi-plan yasimahla. Phucula ukuze uvule ezinye iimpawu ezifana neebackups, iinkcukacha ezongezelelweyo, kunye neenketho zobumfihlo eziphucukileyo.
profile.portalOpenFailed: Akukwazanga kuvulwa i-portal yentlawulo. Nceda uzame kwakhona.
profile.followHint: Iibali zabo ziya kuvela kwi-feed yakho yokuLandela ukuba bapapasha nabalandeli (okanye Elubala).
profile.sectionCrashedBody: Kukho into engahambanga kakuhle kweli candelo.
profile.callTextForwardingDescription: Dlulisa iimbizo nemiyalezo engenayo kwifowuni yakho eqinisekisiweyo okanye i-imeyile. Iimbizo/imiyalezo ephumayo inokubonisa inombolo yakho yaseChatforia.
profile.errSmsDest: Khetha ubuncinane indawo enye (ifowuni okanye i-imeyile).
profile.errQuietHours: Iiyure zokuzola kufuneka zibe phakathi kwe-0 ne-23.
profile.ageBandHint: Sigcina kuphela uluhlu lweminyaka yobudala (hayi umhla wakho wokuzalwa ochanekileyo) . Oku kusetyenziselwa ukugcina ukudityaniswa kwi-Random Chat kulungile.
profile.wantsAgeFilter: Sebenzisa ukudityaniswa okusekelwe kwiminyaka kwi-Random Chat
profile.wantsAgeFilterDesc: Xa ivuliwe, sizama ukukudibanisa nabantu abakwiminyaka efanelekileyo.
profile.partnerAgeBandsDesc: Abakwishumi elivisayo bahlala bedityaniswa kuphela nabanye abakwishumi elivisayo. Abantu abadala abanakudityaniswa nabakwishumi elivisayo.
profile.teenMatchingNote: Ngenxa yokhuseleko, ii-akhawunti ezikwiminyaka eyi-13–17 zingadityaniswa kuphela nezinye ii-akhawunti ezikwiminyaka eyi-13–17 kwi-Random Chat.
profile.foriaRememberDesc: Xa oku kuvuliwe, uForia angasebenzisa iincoko zakho zangaphambili ze-Random Chat (nawe wedwa) ukuze incoko iqhubeke. Ungakwazi ukuyicima nanini na.
profile.voicemailAutoDeleteDays: Zicime ngokuzenzekelayo imiyalezo yelizwi emva kwe-(iintsuku)
profile.voicemailGreetingTextDesc: Isetyenziswa xa umyalezo wakho ongundoqo we-audio ungasebenzi.
profile.voicemailNote: Ii-voicemail ezivela kumanani akho e-Chatforia ziya kugcinwa kwi-inbox yakho ye-Voicemail. Ungavula ukuguqulelwa komyalezo nokuthunyelwa kwiiplan ezixhaswayo.
profile.portHint: Ufuna ukugcina inombolo yakho yangoku? Ungayitshintshela kwi-Chatforia Wireless.

aiSettings.title: Iisetingi ze-AI
aiSettings.controlIntro: Lawula inguqulelo, iimpendulo ezikrelekrele, kunye neempendulo ezizenzekelayo zeForiaBot.
aiSettings.icebisoLeempenduloEzikrelekrele: Thumela imiyalezo embalwa yokugqibela efunyenweyo (ecociweyo) kwi-AI ukuze icebise iimpendulo ezikhawulezayo.
aiSettings.icebisoLokufihlaAmagamaAmanyala: Ukuba ivuliwe, amagama afakwe i-flag aza kufihlwa kwiingcebiso ezivela kwi-AI

iisetingiZokufikeleleka.inkcazeloYokufikeleleka: Iinketho zokwenza iChatforia ibe lula ukuyisebenzisa ngaphandle kokuxhomekeka kwisandi.
iisetingiZokufikeleleka.interfaceFontSizeHelp: Iqala kubungakanani obuqhelekileyo. Yandisa ukuba ukhetha umbhalo omkhulu.
iisetingiZokufikeleleka.visualAlertsDesc: Bonisa iibhanela nesihloko esidanyazayo ukuze ungaphoswa zizinto ezenzekayo.
iisetingiZokufikeleleka.vibrateOnNewShort: Yivibrate xa ufumana imiyalezo emitsha (xa ixhaswa)
iisetingiZokufikeleleka.vibrateOnNewDesc: Yenza isixhobo sivibrate xa ufumana izaziso.
iisetingiZokufikeleleka.liveCaptionsDesc: Bonisa iinkcazo zexesha lokwenyani ezisuka kwisandi somnye umntu okunye.
iisetingiZokufikeleleka.notificationsDesc: Izilumkiso ezibonakalayo zemiyalezo neefowuni\nBonisa iibhena nesihloko esidanyazayo ukuze ungaphoswa zizinto ezenzekayo.
iisetingiZokufikeleleka.vibrateOnNew: Yivibrate xa ufumana imiyalezo emitsha (xa kusekhona inkxaso)\nYivibrate isixhobo xa ufumana izaziso.
iisetingiZokufikeleleka.flashOnCall: Khanyisa isikrini xa kufika umnxeba\nKhanya kancinci ngokukhawuleza xa umnxeba uqhwaba.

privacySection.strictE2EE: Ukukhuselwa okungqongqo ukusuka ekuqaleni ukuya ekugqibeleni

privacySection.strictE2EEDisabled: I-E2EE engqongqo icinyiwe. I-AI/Translate iphinde yavulwa.

esim.title: eSIM
esim.heading: Lungiselela i-eSIM yakho
esim.subheading: Faka i-eSIM yakho ukuze usebenzise idatha ye-Chatforia Mobile kwesi sixhobo.
esim.body: Yenza okanye uvule i-QR code ye-eSIM yakho uze ulandele imiyalelo yokuqalisa kwifowuni yakho.
esim.readyBody: I-eSIM yakho ilungile. Ungavula i-QR code okanye uqhubeke nokulawula isicwangciso sakho seselula.

esim.title: i-eSIM ye-Chatforia
esim.errorReserve: Akukwazanga ukubhukisha i-eSIM. Nceda uzame kwakhona.

esim.step3: Skenisha le QR code uze ulandele amanyathelo akwi-screen ukuze ugqibezele ukuvula.

disclaimer.devices: Iipakethe zedatha ze-eSIM zifuna isixhobo esihambelana ne-eSIM nesivuliweyo. Ukufumaneka kwahluka ngokwemodeli yefowuni, umthwali, kunye nelizwe. Ukufikelela kunye nesantya ziyahluka ngokwengingqi.

uthelekiso.isikhanyeli: Ukusetyenziswa kwedatha kuyaxhomekeka kwindlela osebenzisa ngayo iChatforia (ilizwi, ividiyo, imidiya, nezinye ii-apps kwifowuni yakho).

family.disclaimer: Iipakethe zosapho zenza okanye zongeza kwidama ledatha ekwabelwana ngalo. Ungamenywa kwaye ususe amalungu nanini na.
family.footnote: Iipakethe zosapho zabelana ngedama ledatha elinye kuzo zonke ii-akhawunti zeChatforia ezidibeneyo. Ukufumaneka nemida kuxhomekeke kwilizwe lakho nemimiselo yasekuhlaleni.

kwakho.isihlokwana: IChatforia ikunika inombolo yefowuni yokwenyani, uguqulelo olukrelekrele, kunye nendlela ecacileyo yokuphelisa iintengiso xa sele ukulungele.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Iintengiso ezingephi kwi-Free, uphuculo olulula lwe-Plus xa ukulungele, kunye nezixhobo ze-Premium ezingafumanekiyo kwi-TextNow.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs ii-apps zokuncokola
messengers.body: Thumela imiyalezo yeefowuni zokwenyani — hayi kuphela kubasebenzisi be-app abanye — nge-AI kunye nesimo esakhelwe ngaphakathi. Kuyamangalisa ukuba usuka kwii-apps ezifana ne-TextFree okanye i-TextMe.

kwakho.isikhanyeli: Uthelekiso lusekelwe kulwazi olufumaneka esidlangalaleni kwaye lunokutshintsha ngokuhamba kwexesha. Ezinye ii-apps zokuthumela imiyalezo yasimahla ezifana ne-TextFree okanye i-TextMe zifana kakhulu ne-TextNow.

yasimahla.a: Ewe. Icebo lasimahla liquka inombolo yeChatforia, ukufowuna, kunye nokuthumela imiyalezo eneenxalenye zentengiso. Ungahlala kwicebo lasimahla ixesha elide ngendlela othanda ngayo, okanye uphucule ukuze ususe iintengiso kwaye uvule ezinye iimpawu.

plusPremium.a: I-Plus isusa iintengiso kwaye yandise imbali yakho yemiyalezo — ilungele ukusetyenziswa kwemihla ngemihla. I-Premium yongeza ukwenza ngokwezifiso okongeziweyo, izixhobo ze-AI zokubhala ngokutsha nokuphendula, kunye nenkxaso ephambili yabasebenzisi abaninzi.

esim.a: I-Chatforia Mobile isebenzisa ugcino-lwazi lwe-eSIM lwehlabathi jikelele. Ukufumaneka kuxhomekeke kwilizwe lakho nakwisixhobo sakho. Uza kubona iinketho ezixhaswayo ngexesha lokuqalisa ukusebenzisa ngaphakathi kwi-app.

cancel.q: Ndingakurhoxisa okanye nditshintshe izicwangciso nangaliphi na ixesha?
cancel.a: Ewe. Ungalawula okanye urhoxise ubhaliso lwakho kwiphepha lokuhlawula kwi-app. Utshintsho luqala ukusebenza ekupheleni kwexesha lakho langoku lokuhlawula.

family.a: Iipakethe zoSapho zenza idama ledatha ekwabelwana ngalo kwii-akhawunti ezininzi zeChatforia. Umntu omnye uhlawula ityala , kwaye ungamema okanye ususe amalungu kwaye umisele imida kumntu ngamnye.

howItWorks.title: Indlela iChatforia Esebenza Ngayo
howItWorks.intro: IChatforia yenzelwe ukwenza unxibelelwano lube lula, lukhawuleze, kwaye lufikeleleke. Ukuqalisa kuthatha amanyathelo ambalwa nje.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Qhagamshelana nabanye ngokukhetha abaqhagamshelani okanye uqalise iincoko ezintsha.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Imiyalezo iyahanjiswa ngokukhawuleza ukunika amava onxibelelwano alula.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Inguqulelo efakwe ngaphakathi inceda abasebenzisi ukuba banxibelelane ngeelwimi ezahlukeneyo.
howItWorks.step5Desc: Lawula izinto ozikhethayo, abaqhagamshelwano, kunye nezicwangciso zonxibelelwano.

ukhuseleko.intro: IChatforia izinikele ekugcineni imeko ekhuselekileyo nenentlonipho kubo bonke abasebenzisi. Ezi zikhokelo zinceda ekuqinisekiseni amava amnandi kumntu wonke.
ukhuseleko.inkcazelo yentlonipho: Abasebenzisi kulindeleke ukuba banxibelelane ngentlonipho. Ukuxhatshazwa, ukusetyenziswa gwenxa, okanye indlela yokuziphatha eyingozi akukho kuvunyelweyo.
ukhuseleko.ugunyuzoDesc: Singathatha amanyathelo nxamnye nee-akhawunti ezaphula ezi zikhokelo, kuquka izilumkiso, izithintelo, okanye ukususwa okusisigxina kwiqonga.

whyMessaging.title: Isizathu Sokuba Amaqonga OkuThumela Imiyalezo Abe Nangakumbi Ngoku KuneNkathi Zonke
whyMessaging.intro: Amaqonga okuthumela imiyalezo sele eyizixhobo eziphambili kakhulu zonxibelelwano kweli hlabathi lanamhlanje. Ukususela kwiincoko zobuqu ukuya kunxibelelwano lweshishini, ii-apps zokuthumela imiyalezo zivumela abantu ukuba bahlale benxibelelana ngoko nangoko nangempumelelo.
whyMessaging.speedDesc: Enye yezona nzuzo ziphambili zamaqonga onxibelelwano isantya sawo. Imiyalezo ifika kwangoko, ivumela abasebenzisi ukuba banxibelelane ngexesha lokwenyani. Le ndlela yokukhululeka yenze ukuba ukuthumela imiyalezo kube yeyona ndlela ithandwayo yonxibelelwano kubantu abaninzi.
whyMessaging.globalDesc: Iiqonga zemiyalezo zidibanisa abantu kwihlabathi jikelele. Ngokufikelela kwi-intanethi, abasebenzisi banokunxibelelana nokuba phi na, nto leyo eyenza kube lula ukwakha ubudlelwane nokusebenzisana namazwe ngamazwe.
whyMessaging.privacyDesc: Iiqonga zokuthumela imiyalezo zanamhlanje zigxile ekunikezeni abasebenzisi ulawulo kwidatha yabo nakwiincoko zabo. Iimpawu ezifana nokukhuselwa kwemfihlo (encryption), useto lobumfihlo, kunye nezilawuli zemiyalezo zivumela abasebenzisi ukuba banxibelelane ngokuzithemba.
whyMessaging.futureDesc: Ukuthumela imiyalezo kuyaqhubeka nokuvela ngeempawu ezintsha ezifana neempendulo ezisebenza nge-AI, uguqulelo, kunye nokwabelana nge-multimedia. Njengoko itekhnoloji iqhubela phambili, amaqonga okuthumela imiyalezo aza kuba namandla ngakumbi kwaye abe neendlela ezininzi zokusebenza.

global.title: Ikamva Lonxibelelwano Lwehlabathi
global.barriersDesc: Olunye lwezona tshintsho zikhulu kunxibelelwano kukuncipha kwezithintelo zejografi. Abantu ngoku banokunxibelelana nabanye kwihlabathi jikelele phantse ngexesha lokwenene. Nokuba yincoko yobuqu, ishishini, okanye intsebenziswano, amaqonga onyibelo enze umgama ungabi nantsingiselo kangako.
global.translationDesc: Ulwimi ngokwesiqhelo belusoloko lulunye lwezona miqobo inkulu kunxibelelwano lwehlabathi jikelele. Namhlanje, izixhobo zokuguqulela ezakhelweyo zinceda ukudibanisa elo gxalaba. Amaqonga afana neChatforia avumela abasebenzisi ukuba banxibelelane ngokulula nangona bethetha iilwimi ezahlukeneyo, edala amathuba amatsha okunxibelelana nokuqondana.
global.realtimeDesc: Isantya sisona sizathu siphambili esibumba unxibelelwano lwangoku. Abasebenzisi balindele ukuba imiyalezo ihanjiswe ngokukhawuleza, kwaye iziseko zangoku zophuhliso ixhasa eso silindelo. Uthumelo lwemiyalezo ngexesha lokwenyani lwenza iincoko zibe zendalo kwaye zihambe kakuhle.
global.privacyDesc: Njengoko unxibelelwano luya lwenza lube lwedijithali, ubumfihlo no khuseleko ziya zibaluleka ngakumbi. Abasebenzisi bafuna ukuqiniseka ukuba iincoko zabo zikhuselwe. Iimpawu ezifana nokufihlakala kwedatha (encryption) kunye nezicwangciso ezilawulwa ngumsebenzisi zinceda ekuxhaseni amava onxibelelwano akhuselekileyo ngakumbi.
global.futureDesc: Ikamva lonxibelelwano lwehlabathi jikelele kunokwenzeka ukuba lube nezixhobo eziphucukileyo, ezifana nemiyalezo encediswa yi-AI, uguqulelo oluphuculweyo, kunye namava angcono abasebenzisi. Njengoko itekhnoloji iqhubela phambili, unxibelelwano luza kuqhubeka lwenza lula ukuba luqondwe kwaye lufikeleleke.
global.outro: Amaqonga afana neChatforia ayinxalenye yolu tshintsho, enceda abantu ukuba banxibelelane ngokulula ngakumbi ngaphaya kweelwimi nemida.

chatSafely.title: Indlela Yokuncokola Ngokukhuselekileyo Kwi-intanethi
chatSafely.intro: Unxibelelwano lwe-intanethi lwenze kwaba lula ngaphezu kwangaphambili ukunxibelelana nabantu kwihlabathi jikelele. Nokuba uthumela imiyalezo kubahlobo, udibana nabantu abatsha, okanye usebenzisana nabantu ngokomsebenzi, amajelo okuthumela imiyalezo adlala indima enkulu kubomi bemihla ngemihla. Nangona kunjalo, ukukhuseleka kwi-intanethi kubaluleke ngokufanayo nokuhlala unxibelelene.

personalInfo.title: Khusela Iinkcukacha Zakho Zobuqu
personalInfo.body: Omnye wemigaqo ebaluleke kakhulu yokhuseleko kwi-intanethi kukuphepha ukwabelana ngeenkcukacha zobuqu ezibuthathaka. Oku kubandakanya idilesi yakho yasekhaya, iinkcukacha zemali, iipasiwedi, okanye nayiphi na inkcukacha ekunokuthi ngayo waziwe enokuthi isetyenziswe gwenxa. Nkqu nangeencoko eziqhelekileyo, kungcono uqaphele into oyabelanayo nokuba wabelana nabani na ngayo.

safetyFeatures.body: Iinkqubo zokuthumela imiyalezo zale mihla ezifana neChatforia zibonelela ngezixhobo zokunceda abasebenzisi bahlale bekhuselekile. Iimpawu ezifana nokuthintela, ukuxela, kunye nezilawuli zobumfihlo zenzelwe ukunika abasebenzisi ulawulo kumava abo. Ukuba umntu uthatha indlela engafanelekanga okanye akwenza ungakhululeki, kufuneka usebenzise ezi zixhobo ngoko nangoko.

iinkohliso.title: Yiba Nolwazi Ngeenkohliso
iinkohliso.body: Abakhohlisi bahlala besebenzisa amaqonga onxibelelwano ukukhohlisa abasebenzisi ukuba babelane ngeenkcukacha zabo zobuqu okanye bathumele imali. Lumka imiyalezo ebonakala imnandi kakhulu ukuba ingaba yinyani, enjengezibonelelo ezingalindelekanga, izicelo ezingxamisekileyo, okanye amakhonkco angaziwayo. Hlala uqinisekisa isazisi somntu onxibelelana naye phambi kokuba uthathe nawaphi na amanyathelo.

ngokunoxanduva.title: Nxibelelana Ngokunoxanduva ly
ngokunoxanduva.body: Unxibelelwano oluhloniphekileyo lunceda ukudala imeko ekhuselekileyo kuye wonke umntu. Kuphephe ukuthatha inxaxheba kwiincoko eziyingozi okanye ezihlambanyayo, kwaye uqaphele indlela amazwi akho anokuchaphazela ngayo abanye. Unxibelelwano oluhle lwenza igalelo kumava angcono kubo bonke abasebenzisi.

whySafety.title: Kutheni uKhuseleko kwi-Intanethi lubalulekile
whySafety.body: Njengoko unxibelelwano lwedijithali luqhubeka lukhula, ukugcina ukhuseleko nokuthembeka kuya kusiba kubaluleke kakhulu. Ngokulandela iindlela ezisisiseko zokhuseleko nokusebenzisa izixhobo ezikhoyo, abasebenzisi banokonwabela iinzuzo zokuthumela imiyalezo ngelixa banciphisa iingozi.

chatSafely.conclusion: Ukuhlala ukhuselekile kwi-intanethi akufuni kulwazi lobuchwepheshe oluphucukileyo—kufuneka wazi, ulumke, kwaye ube nengqiqo. Ngamakhwethhe afanelekileyo, unokunxibelelana ngokuzithemba kwaye ngokukhuselekileyo.

about.description: IChatforia yinkonzo yezabelo ekhuselekileyo, esebenzisa iilwimi ezininzi, enokufihla iinkcukacha ukusuka ekuqaleni ukuya ekugqibeleni, ukuhumusha okukhawulezileyo, kunye nokufowuna ngelizwi/ividiyo. Injongo yethu ilula: ukunceda abantu banxibelelane—ngokukhuselekileyo, ngasese, nangaphaya kweelwimi.

press.title: Press
press.boilerplateBody: I-Chatforia yi-app yokuthumela imiyalezo ebeka phambili ubumfihlo eyenza incoko yezilwimi ezahlukeneyo ibe lula. Imiyalezo i-end-to -zifihliwe ngokupheleleyo ngokungagqibekanga, kwaye uguqulelo olwakhelweyo luxhasa iilwimi ezingaphezu kwe-100 ngexesha lokwenene. Abasebenzisi banokwenza imiyalezo inyamalale, bagcine iirisithi zokufunda zinganyanzelekanga, kwaye bahlanganise izixhobo zabo. Ifumaneka kwi-iOS, i-Android, nakwi-webhu.
